languages.text: Тело этого ксеноса покрыто глубокими рваными пробоинами, будто кто-то яростно всаживал нож в металлического врага, пока он не пал.
The xenos's body is covered in deep, jagged gashes, as if someone had furiously driven a knife into the metallic foe until it finally died.
languages.original_text: Тело этого ксеноса покрыто глубокими рваными пробоинами, будто кто-то яростно всаживал нож в металлического врага, пока он не пал.

traits.locale_text: The xenos's body is covered in deep, jagged gashes, as if someone has furiously driven a knife into the metallic foe until it finally died.

The xenos's body is covered in deep, jagged gashes, as if someone had furiously driven a knife into the metallic foe until it finally died.

languages.text: 这异形的身上布满了深深的锯齿状伤口，仿佛曾有人疯狂地用刀一次次刺向那金属敌人，直到它彻底死去。
languages.original_text: The xenos's body is covered in deep, jagged gashes, as if someone had furiously driven a knife into the metallic foe until it finally died.

traits.locale_text: 这异形的身上布满了深深的锯齿状伤口，仿佛曾有人疯狂地用刀一次次刺向那金属敌人，直到它彻底死去。

languages.text: Zenonun bedeni, sanki birisi metalik düşman sonunda ölene dek öfkeyle bıçak saplamış gibi derin, pürüzlü yarıklarla kaplı.
languages.original_text: The xenos's body is covered in deep, jagged gashes, as if someone had furiously driven a knife into the metallic foe until it finally died.

traits.locale_text: Zenonun bedeni, sanki birisi metalik düşman sonunda ölene dek öfkeyle bıçak saplamış gibi derin, pürüzlü yarıklarla kaplı.

languages.text: Le cadavre du xénos métallique est couvert de profondes entailles irrégulières, comme si quelqu'un l'avait furieusement poignardé jusqu'à ce que mort s'ensuive.
languages.original_text: The xenos's body is covered in deep, jagged gashes, as if someone had furiously driven a knife into the metallic foe until it finally died.

traits.locale_text: Le cadavre du xénos métallique est couvert de profondes entailles irrégulières, comme si quelqu'un l'avait furieusement poignardé jusqu'à ce que mort s'ensuive.

languages.text: El cuerpo del xenos está cubierto de laceraciones profundas y aserradas, como si alguien hubiera acuchillado con furia a la criatura metálica hasta que dejara de moverse.
languages.original_text: The xenos's body is covered in deep, jagged gashes, as if someone had furiously driven a knife into the metallic foe until it finally died.

traits.locale_text: El cuerpo del xenos está cubierto de laceraciones profundas y aserradas, como si alguien hubiera acuchillado con furia a la criatura metálica hasta que dejara de moverse.

languages.text: Der Körper des Xenos ist mit tiefen Wunden übersät, als hätte jemand mit einem Messer auf den metallenen Feind eingestochen, bis er endlich tot war.
languages.original_text: The xenos's body is covered in deep, jagged gashes, as if someone had furiously driven a knife into the metallic foe until it finally died.

traits.locale_text: Der Körper des Xenos ist mit tiefen Wunden übersät, als hätte jemand mit einem Messer auf den metallenen Feind eingestochen, bis er endlich tot war.

languages.text: 異種族の体は、深く、ぎざぎざの切り傷で覆われている。まるで誰かが、その金属の敵が事切れるまで、怒りに任せてナイフを突き立て続けたかのように。
languages.original_text: The xenos's body is covered in deep, jagged gashes, as if someone had furiously driven a knife into the metallic foe until it finally died.

traits.locale_text: 異種族の体は、深く、ぎざぎざの切り傷で覆われている。まるで誰かが、その金属の敵が事切れるまで、怒りに任せてナイフを突き立て続けたかのように。
